description_long: This is a dark glass wine bottle with a classic Bordeaux shape, featuring a gently sloping shoulder and a long, narrow neck. The bottle is predominantly a deep, nearly black color, giving it an elegant and traditional appearance. A rectangular label is affixed to the front, displaying an image of grape clusters and some text, suggesting a vineyard or wine brand. The label is mostly white and green with photographic elements, standing out against the dark bottle. The closure at the top appears to be a standard wine bottle cap, possibly a cork, with no visible foil or capsule covering it. The bottle's surface is smooth and hard, typical of glass, and there are no visible decorative elements or embossing on the body.
description: A dark glass wine bottle with a long neck and a rectangular label featuring grapes, exuding a classic and elegant appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the label with grape imagery and text, clearly visible against the dark bottle.
description_view_1: Angled view with the label partially visible, revealing the bottle's smooth, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_2: Rear view with no label or markings, displaying the bottle's uniform dark color and classic shape.
description_view_3: Side view with the edge of the label just visible, emphasizing the bottle's cylindrical form.
attribute_label_or_branding: A rectangular label on the front of the bottle, featuring an image of grape clusters and some text. The label is mostly white and green, with photographic and possibly gold or yellow text elements. It is centered and occupies a moderate portion of the bottle's front.
attribute_bottle_neck_shape: Long, narrow, and straight neck with a gentle taper toward the top and a slight bulge at the transition to the bottle body.
